log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 24 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 9/67
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 9/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (9/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: -4/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
